title: Rubaiyat of Omar Khayyam
gloss: The quatranes of Umar Khhyyam, a well known Persian poet with commentary in English by Hafiz Anwar Ali Siddiqi, Rohtak. Part I. Gafil Namah.
copyright: Hafiz Anwar Ali, Rohtak; No. (?), dated the (?) July, 1910.
notes: Omar Khayyam with English commentary by a Rohtak hafiz — the FitzGerald-era Khayyam vogue refracted back through Indian print.

author: Madho Narayan, Lala

title: Adhhyatm Sangraha
gloss: A cellection of short Jain religious poems, some of which are in Hindi and others in Sanskrit, for recitation. Edited by B. Umed Singh, Amritsar.
notes: Jain liturgical anthology; publisher firm identified as 'Jaini'.
